message.content: This section covers the topic of chart types, specifically identifying "折线图" (line chart) as a listed category. It can answer questions regarding which chart types are referenced or included in the document. The excerpt does not contain dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types.
